store.name: Driftline
store.tagline: Surf and skate apparel for everyday cruising.
store.description: Driftline is a small San Diego apparel brand making surf- and skate-inspired tees, hoodies, and boardshorts. Every piece is screen-printed locally in small runs, designed by riders for riders.

audience.description: Surfers, skaters, and beach-town day-trippers who want technical apparel that doesn't look uniformly branded. 18-35, salt-and-concrete crowd.

references.notes: Photography-led product cards, ocean palette, easy reading rhythm.
Editorial product detail pages, lots of whitespace.
